data.body: LANDED on main via Gerrit (§4). All 10 stories reviewed into feature/oss-readiness as changes 291-300 (each LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1, zero blocks/CI failures; CI on the bottom of the chain needed a 'recheck' to trigger). Submitted the chain, then the single --no-ff merge-back (change 301: LLM-Review+1 merge-change over 10 integrated commits, Verified+1) submitted into main = merge commit 3af43180a. gerrit/main advanced 1b77c6da..3af43180a and replicates to the GitHub mirror. Epic complete.
